title: Umami Velvety Mushroom French Stir-fry
description: A one-pot French dish featuring velvety mushrooms and sherry for a umami-rich flavor profile, served as an elegant yet approachable main course.
instructions: Slice the shiitake mushrooms into thin rounds.
Dice button mushrooms and onions. Chop garlic finely.
In a large oven-safe skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add red onion and garlic; sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in shiitake mushrooms and add vegetable stock cube. Let it simmer for another minute.
Pour in sherry wine and let reduce slightly, then stir through nutritional yeast (if using).
Fold thyme leaves into the skillet mixture.
Place skillet in preheated oven and roast until edges of mushrooms start to brown, about 15 minutes.
Remove from oven, season with salt and pepper. Serve hot as a main dish or side.
For added flavor, drizzle with melted vegan butter before serving.
